rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 2, 2013, line 1. Plaintiffs Robert Mostovoy and Linda Mostovoy's Motion To Enforce Settlement GRANTED, no competent evidence of timely compliance or attempts to comply before the deadline. = (501/REQ)
